programme.title: Live: NHL on TNT Face Off
programme.desc: Wayne Gretzky, Liam McHugh, Anson Carter, and Paul Bissonnette present pregame coverage.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Canadiens play the Sabres in the East second round Game 1 at KeyBank Center. Buffalo reached the second round for the first time since 2007 by beating Boston 4-2, while Montreal advanced by defeating Tampa Bay in a seven-game series.

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Ducks take on the Golden Knights at T-Mobile Arena for Game 2 of the West second round. Vegas leads the series after a 3-1 Game 1 win. Mitch Marner had a 162-foot empty-netter and an assist. Carter Hart was sensational, stopping 33 of 34 shots.

programme.title: Live: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: A long-term AIDS survivor asks Rush and Valens to reopen the case involving his murdered partner, an AIDS activist and scorned member of a prominent family.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team investigates the 1919 death of a young girl who wanted more rights for women.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team reopens the 2005 murder of a longshoreman who got in the middle of a profitable human-trafficking ring led by the Russian mob.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: When a nurse confesses to six mercy killings, the team reopens a 1998 case involving a terminally ill man who died suspiciously.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: While investigating the 2006 murder-suicide of a family, the team must contend with an obsessed, suicidal killer in a hostage situation.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When an attorney is found dead near the body of a private escort, the team must piece together what connected the two seemingly random victims; Jubal's connection with one of the victims makes finding the killer much more personal.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a truck filled with armor-piercing rifles is hijacked, the team works to discover who stole it, and what they have planned for the stolen weapons; a friend from OA's past returns to help with the case, but OA isn't sure he can trust him.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After the police ignore a desperate father's plea for help, he abducts a billionaire's daughter and holds her hostage in a safe room until his own missing child is returned to him; Jubal puts his hostage negotiation skills to the test.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the team is called to the scene of a murder, it quickly suspects political motivation; Maggie contemplates a decision that could affect her entire career.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: Jess LaCroix and his team come to help OA find a fugitive LaCroix arrested years ago after a bus with 26 students goes missing, and he's the main suspect.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team investigates a drug deal gone bad after the body of a college student is found; Detective Hailey Upton temporarily joins the team and finds her investigative methods clash with the Bureau's more buttoned-up environment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team welcomes a new member, Special Agent Tiffany Wallace, as they search for killers who orchestrated a mass shooting at a media company; OA's personal connection with the case threatens to cloud his judgment.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After eight people are fatally poisoned at a deli in New York City, agents Maggie Bell and OA Zidan trace the crime to an unlikely culprit and conduct a sting operation to prevent further attacks.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Aquaman and the Lost Kingdom
programme.desc: After failing to defeat Aquaman the first time, Black Manta wields the power of the mythic Black Trident to unleash an ancient and malevolent force. Hoping to end his reign of terror, Aquaman forges an unlikely alliance with his brother, Orm, the former king of Atlantis. Setting aside their differences, they join forces to protect their kingdom and save the world from irreversible destruction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Live: NHL Hockey
programme.desc: The Hurricanes take on the Flyers in Game 3 of the East second round at Xfinity Mobile Arena. Carolina leads 2-0. Frederik Andersen made 34 saves, while Dan Vladar stopped 40 shots in a losing effort. Taylor Hall scored the deciding goal.

programme.title: Live: NHL Post-Game on TNT
programme.desc: Liam McHugh, Anson Carter and Paul Bissonnette recap the night in the NHL.

programme.title: Aquaman
programme.desc: Once home to the most advanced civilization on Earth, the city of Atlantis is now an underwater kingdom ruled by the power-hungry King Orm. With a vast army at his disposal, Orm plans to conquer the remaining oceanic people -- and then the surface world. Standing in his way is Arthur, Orm's half-human, half-Atlantean brother and true heir to the throne. With help from royal counselor Vulko, Arthur must retrieve the legendary Trident of Atlan and embrace his destiny as protector of the deep sea.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The Jokers hatch horrible revenge schemes on their office bullies, then put one poor contractor through the wringer as they attempt home improvement projects; tonight's loser will be gifted the world's finest douchemobile.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: Lilly returns to work several weeks after being shot and tries to convince herself that she is emotionally ready to spearhead the reopening of the 1994 case of three slain boys.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team reopens the 1998 case of a reportedly promiscuous 15-year-old girl who was fatally beaten and found partially clothed.

programme.title: Cold Case
programme.desc: The team reopens the case of an Amish teenager who was murdered just weeks after leaving home for Philadelphia to experience rumspringa.

Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team races to stop an active serial killer after three women are found weighted down at the bottom of a lake; Jubal looks into an old closed case after there are multiple similarities to the recent victims.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the leader of a drug cartel and one of the world's most wanted men is apprehended by the team, the entire FBI headquarters is put at risk when his henchmen unveil a plot to free him; Isobel must make a difficult decision.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: A shooting at a quinceañera leaves two dead, but the team believes they may not have been the intended targets; Maggie is conflicted as the team decides the best plan of action for using a witness to take down their suspect.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team searches for a young girl who was kidnapped from a cabin during a family vacation; Maggie questions her relationship with Nestor when she learns he hasn't been completely honest with her.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team must infiltrate a drug trafficking gang after the robbery of a chemical plant leaves two customs agents dead; Nestor offers his help on the case, giving Maggie new insight into his character.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team hunts a killer who is fatally shooting seemingly unrelated targets; new agent Tiffany Wallace experiences tension between her work as an FBI agent and the responsibility she feels to her community as a Black woman.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a bomb leaves three people dead, the team presses a reluctant informant to gather information from his close friends who are under suspicion; OA and his girlfriend clash over where the informant's rights lie.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When a reporter is kidnapped and held without a ransom demand, the team must dig into her past relationships in order to pin down her assailant's motive; Isobel's relationship comes under fire when the case makes a connection to her boyfriend.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team must track down two assailants who wear animal masks while committing armed robberies; Tiffany and Scola butt heads on whether to accept the local NYPD's offer to help in the investigation.

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: After a man is killed by an explosive package shipped to his home, the team attempts to capture the sender and intercept his latest deadly parcel; Maggie struggles to trust her younger sister.

Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: The team rushes to track down two doctors abducted by a desperate father willing to do anything to save his son; Jubal's uncertainty in his family life affects his judgment during the hostage situation.

Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: FBI
programme.desc: When the CEO of a major brokerage firm is killed while surrounded by protesters, the team looks into who had the most to lose from his company's perceived manipulations; Scola's previous Wall Street career and the reasons he left come to light.

programme.title: Foul Play With Anthony Davis
programme.desc: NBA star Bam Adebayo pulls WNBA MVP A'ja Wilson into an uncomfortable autograph scandal; Anthony Davis drops NFL star safety Quentin Lake and NFL analyst Jay Glazer into chaos during a competition show gone wrong.
